content.text: <ide_opened_file>The user opened the file d:\containers\claude-rts\docs\adr-blueprint-execution-model.md in the IDE. This may or may not be related to the current task.</ide_opened_file>

ok based on this ADR, we shoudl have an epic on gh already with linked issues

the recommendation was to consolidate all linked issues into one big issue and implement the big issue so lets first do the consolidation
Now let me check GitHub for the epic and linked issues.

So the v1 implementation is split across #133, #134, #135, #136, while #137 and #138 are explicit follow-ups out of scope for v1. I'll consolidate the four v1 issues into one big implementation issue, then close the individual ones.
Created #139. Now close the four individual issues with a reference to it.

Done. Here's what happened:

- **Created** [#139](https://github.com/hyang0129/supreme-claudemander/issues/139) — full v1 blueprint implementation, consolidating the scope of #133–136 into one implementable issue with the complete ADR-aligned spec (schema, BlueprintCard, ContainerStarterCard, frontend, all acceptance criteria)
- **Closed** #133, #134, #135, #136 — each with a comment pointing to #139

Left open:
- **#137** — Blueprint execution trace visualization (explicit v1 follow-up)
- **#138** — Blueprint Manager widget (explicit v1 follow-up)
- **#48** — The original epic (still valid as the parent)
add e2e testing as a requirement based on the e2e qa workflow. Essentially this is an extra step before reviewing the PR

[#139](https://github.com/hyang0129/supreme-claudemander/issues/139) updated. What was added:

**New "E2E QA (required before PR review)" section** specifying:
- The 5-agent workflow to run (Analyst → Designer → Implementer → Runner/Fixer loop → final Runner)
- Which dependencies must be real (Docker, config files, aiohttp server, `/ws/control` WS) vs mocked
- Six minimum scenarios to cover — the full blueprint lifecycle, validation errors, container readiness, timeout failure, Playwright context menu test, and smoke regression
- A hard verdict gate: `E2E_FINAL_REPORT.md` must be PASS or PARTIAL (no critical issues) before the PR is submitted

**Two new acceptance criteria** at the bottom of the checklist for the E2E report and smoke test regression check.
